trending_topics.context: 3 posts, 1.7x baseline rate — mentioning Runway, Andy Konwinski

sample_posts.text:
👀
https://x.com/wafer_ai/status/2073155792182907085
https://runwayml.com/news/borrowing-the-night-reclaiming-idle-inference-gpus-for-research

Concentration of Power in AI is a Risk, Not a Solution
“The answer to concentration of power in AI is not openness at all costs, but a serious research commons with the resources to compete”
> The piece warns that a "permissioned frontier" where access depends on joining closed institutions undermines innovation, competition, and legitimate governance.
> It calls for a well-funded open AI research commons with frontier-scale compute and resources, enabling universities and independent researchers to compete while keeping AI development more open, collaborative, and broadly distributed.
Source:
